'''hadhufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabalo|sabalo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabalo|sabalo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hadhufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædhifith|hædhifith]] || [[word:hædhifij|hædhifij]] || [[word:hædhifish|hædhifish]] || [[word:hædhifi|hædhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhudhufuth|hadhudhufuth]] || [[word:hadhudhufuj|hadhudhufuj]] || [[word:hadhudhufush|hadhudhufush]] || [[word:hadhudhufu|hadhudhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhufuth|hadhufuth]] || [[word:hadhufuj|hadhufuj]] || [[word:hadhufush|hadhufush]] || [[word:hadhufu|hadhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhuffuth|hadhuffuth]] || [[word:hadhuffuj|hadhuffuj]] || [[word:hadhuffush|hadhuffush]] || [[word:hadhuffuf|hadhuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhufuthu|hadhufuthu]] || [[word:hadhufuju|hadhufuju]] || [[word:hadhufushu|hadhufushu]] || [[word:hadhufuku|hadhufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhufuth|hadhufuth]] || [[word:hadhufuj|hadhufuj]] || [[word:hadhufush|hadhufush]] || [[word:hadhufu|hadhufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhufuthul|hadhufuthul]] || [[word:hadhufujul|hadhufujul]] || [[word:hadhufushul|hadhufushul]] || [[word:hadhufukul|hadhufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhufuthuthu|hadhufuthuthu]] || [[word:hadhufujuju|hadhufujuju]] || [[word:hadhufushushu|hadhufushushu]] || [[word:hadhufuku|hadhufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhufuthun|hadhufuthun]] || [[word:hadhufujun|hadhufujun]] || [[word:hadhufushun|hadhufushun]] || [[word:hadhufukun|hadhufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhufuthuoro|hadhufuthuoro]] || [[word:hadhufujuoro|hadhufujuoro]] || [[word:hadhufushuoro|hadhufushuoro]] || [[word:hadhufukuoro|hadhufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
